body:
This PR:
 - Updates the dependencies
 - Adds the allocation tables back in, now that other jobs are about as expensive
title: Update dependencies

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Adds surface density and humidity to the cache, which enables the coupler to use `get_surface_flux!`.

## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->
It might be better to calculate surface density and humidity in `get_surface_flux!` rather than `saturated_surface_conditions`, but either way is fine I think.

## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

- Adds surface density and humidity to the cache and updates them when not coupled
- Wrap the calculation of surface density and humidity into a function

<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevent documentation.

-->
title: add surface density and humidity to the cache

body:
This PR adds the plot with final profiles of TC single column simulations to the buildkite artifacts of all TC single column test cases. (Before it was only done for Bomex). It also changes the final plot title so that it should appear first in the list of artifacts (easier to find among all the generated mp4 animations).

I think we need this for the explicit/implicit edmf work
title: Add profiles plots to all TC tests, make them appear first in artifacts

body: #877  introduced problem in the EDMF this PR reverts it
title: revert 977

body: The regression infrastructure can't really do comparisons with trivially zero fields, so this needs to be removed.
title: Remove zero mse entry

body: This PR removes a k-loop in grid-mean computations, to help alleviate our dependence on `getindex(::Field, ::PlusHalf)`/`getindex(::Field, ::Cent)`, and help unify these functions into the dycore equations.
title: Remove k-loop in grid-mean computations

body: This PR removes more k-loops, a followup to #920.
title: Remove more k-loops in edmf
